case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS KAKOU, YAO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAKOU, YAO $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $160.00, DEFENDANT CALLED PLAINTIFF SAID HE'D BE AT SOCCER GAME TODAY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $289.13 AS TO DEFENDANT KAKOU, YAO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT KAKOU, YAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAKOU, YAO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KAKOU, YAO
